nameMeanings.name: WIGER
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): apparently a habitational name from a placename, but perhaps also sometimes from an agent noun with the suffix -ere from Middle English wilen ‘to deceive’, with late addition of -h- as if from while.
Probably also an Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Weiler  .

variants.name: Wyler
meanings: English: variant of   Wiler  . This surname is now rare in Britain.
Swiss German: Alemannic form of   Weiler   2.

variants.name: Weiler
meanings: German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from any of several places so named in southern Germany.
German: topographic name from Middle High German wīler ‘hamlet, farmstead, small village’. Compare Wyler .
